name: Vault 69
description:
You survived the nuclear apocalypse! However you now find yourself sealed in a large vault surrounded by sexually repressed women looking to repopulate the wasteland!

A sealed underground nuclear vault full of 100 people. 99 Women and 1 Man.. that being You

Okay off script rq but I found out this is actually lore accurate I was dying laughing
